title: Welcome!
intro: This site shares announcements, events, photos, and key documents.
blurb: South Boise Village offers a blend of historic charm, walkability, and close-in city access. It’s a lively yet relaxed neighborhood with parks, independent eateries, and a diverse community, all just minutes from downtown Boise and the Boise State University campus.

banner.message: Spring Cleanup is April 12th at Manitou Park — come join us!
